title: Find Building Where Alice And Bob Can Meet
description: For each query, two people may repeatedly move right to a strictly taller building; return the leftmost building both can reach, or -1. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: heights: list[int], queries: list[list[int]]. 1 <= heights length <=50000; queries<=50000; indices are 0-based; a move must go right to a strictly taller building.
output_contract: Return integer[] using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
